channel.title: craigslist | real estate - by owner search

item.title: 5 Acres with Well & Septic - $45,000 (Sonoma County)
item.description: Beautiful parcel with mature oaks, seasonal creek, county-approved well and septic already in.

item.title: Rare City Lot - $199,999.00 (Bayview)
item.description: Steep grade, buildable per city planning pre-review.
